title: End of month analysis—$4.4k Profit on a 34% Win Rate.
author: Actual_Resort1892
selftext:
Most people on social media try to sell you the dream of a 90% win rate. It’s a trap.

In reality, you can be consistently profitable with as little as a 15-20% win rate if your Risk:Reward is managed properly.

This month wasn't my -cleanest due to a string of fast-paced losses mid-month, but because some of the winners are significantly larger than the loses, I still walked away with +$4,428.76.

The goal isn't to be right every time; the goal is to be right when it matters. Don't fall for the "95% win rate" scams—market conditions change, but good math doesn't.

How did your March wrap up?
